sn45.29:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, there are these three feelings. What three? Pleasant feeling, painful feeling, neither-painful-nor-pleasant feeling. These are the three feelings.
sn45.29:1.2:
"The Noble Eightfold Path, bhikkhus, is to be developed for the full understanding of these three feelings. What is the Noble Eightfold Path? It is: right view … right concentration.
The Noble Eightfold Path is to be developed for the full understanding of these three feelings."
